message:
chore: adapt to fsqlite 0.1.2 API changes across durability, fsfs, ops, storage

SymbolCodec encode/decode now take &Cx; SqliteValue::Text now accepts Into-compatible types. Updates all call sites and mock impls across four crates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
